query: faded polaroid old photograph yellowed vintage snapshot
message: sub:analog_degradation/faded_polaroid — anti_aesthetic — sepia, yellowing, faded snapshots, browned old photos

response.objective_caption: A mountain range with snow-covered peaks rises behind a wide valley containing a winding river and forested hills. Dense evergreen trees interspersed with patches of snow fill the foreground, while a broad sky fills the upper portion of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A mountainous landscape rendered with heavy analog film grain shows a jagged range with snow-dusted peaks rising behind a winding river and forested hills. Dense evergreen trees and snow patches fill the dark foreground beneath a brooding sky. The image features a washed-out, muted sepia palette with low vibrancy, where pronounced film texture and a faded tonal range create a tactile, archival atmosphere.
